name: mimari-tasarim
description: Koordinat/ada-parsel girince otomatik mimari tasarım, 3B render ve fizibilite üretir.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:www && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run build:www && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run build:www && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:add:ios: npm run build:www && npx cap add ios
scripts.cap:add:android: npm run build:www && npx cap add android
